title: coap_keys.c: decode_key_put_cbor buffer overread after key parsing
description:
File: lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_keys.c
Line: 786

In decode_key_put_cbor(), after parsing a key string, the code reads payload[pos] to get the value type. However, if the key extends to the end of the payload, pos equals payload_len after incrementing, causing a buffer overread.

Example trigger:
- key_len = 5, pos = 95, payload_len = 100
- Check at line 778: 95 + 5 > 100 is false (passes)
- pos += key_len -> pos = 100
- Line 786: payload[100] reads past buffer (valid indices are 0-99)

Fix: Add bounds check before line 786:
  if (pos >= payload_len) { return -EINVAL; }

Impact: Memory safety violation when parsing crafted CBOR key payloads.
